DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT LINDA BAKER, IN PRO-PER, DOES NOT APPEAR. DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST 2ND DEFT ON 11-22-95. PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR PLTF AND AGAINST BOTH DFTS. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF; PLTF SUBMITTED PERPARED JUDGMNT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKER, LINDA BLACK BLACK, TAMI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1250 19TH AVENUE #8, SAN FRANCISCO $1,908.84 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,358.84, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO DEFT TAMI BLACK FOLLOWING ENTRY OF DEFAULT ON 11-22-95.
